mapper.select: SELECT B.BOOKING_ID , B.SCHEDULE_ID , B.MEMBER_ID , B.BOOKER_NM , B.BOOKER_TEL , B.BOOKER_EMAIL , B.TOTAL_QTY , B.TOTAL_AMT , B.BOOKING_STATUS , B.PAYMENT_STATUS , B.REG_DT , P.PROGRAM_NM , S.EVENT_DATE , S.EVENT_TIME , V.VENUE_NM FROM BOOKING B LEFT JOIN SCHEDULE S ON B.SCHEDULE_ID = S.SCHEDULE_ID LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON S.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID LEFT JOIN VENUE V ON P.VENUE_ID = V.VENUE_ID WHERE B.BOOKING_ID = #{bookingId}

SELECT B.BOOKING_ID , B.SCHEDULE_ID , B.MEMBER_ID , B.BOOKER_NM , B.BOOKER_TEL , B.BOOKER_EMAIL , B.TOTAL_QTY , B.TOTAL_AMT , B.BOOKING_STATUS , B.PAYMENT_STATUS , B.REG_DT , P.PROGRAM_NM , S.EVENT_DATE , S.EVENT_TIME , V.VENUE_NM FROM BOOKING B LEFT JOIN SCHEDULE S ON B.SCHEDULE_ID = S.SCHEDULE_ID LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON S.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID LEFT JOIN VENUE V ON P.VENUE_ID = V.VENUE_ID WHERE 1=1
AND B.BOOKING_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND B.BOOKER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
ORDER BY B.REG_DT DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) totcnt FROM BOOKING B LEFT JOIN SCHEDULE S ON B.SCHEDULE_ID = S.SCHEDULE_ID LEFT JOIN PROGRAM P ON S.PROGRAM_ID = P.PROGRAM_ID WHERE 1=1
AND B.BOOKING_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
AND B.BOOKER_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%')
